description:
This intermediate-to-advanced PostgreSQL quiz tests proficiency in core SQL concepts, advanced features, and nuanced understanding of database internals. It combines familiar topics with lesser-known gotchas, using an engaging and challenging tone to reinforce learning through problem-solving.
Topics: JOIN operations, NULL handling, ANSI SQL standards, Transactions, Database Internals, Indexing strategies, Data Sampling techniques
Audience: PostgreSQL users with foundational knowledge seeking to deepen their expertise in advanced SQL and database optimization
